proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +34.3pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
win_001 active: UP_TRI × Auto × Bear (n=21)
win_002 active: UP_TRI × FMCG × Bear (n=19)
win_003 active: UP_TRI × IT × Bear (n=18)
win_004 active: UP_TRI × Metal × Bear (n=15)
win_005 active: UP_TRI × Pharma × Bear (n=13)
win_006 active: UP_TRI × Infra × Bear (n=12)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Bear regime has been absent for 7+ days; if Bear returns, activation will coincide with a regime shift that may itself alter the cohort's win-rate profile
R-multiple 0.61 reflects Day-6 forced-exit dominance (project_anchor §7 D-8); monitor for drift on next archive comparison
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +34.3pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +34.3pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 19 open positions, so activation is deferred and the existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-24) and no trader rejection on record.

watch_001 active: UP_TRI × any × Choppy (n=36)

R-multiple 0.72 remains under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance); if R distribution deteriorates next archive, cohort may demote
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +27.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +27.9pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.72. The sector=Metal filter narrows rather than amplifies UP_TRI exposure (13 of 19 open) in a 100% Choppy-concentrated portfolio, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental concentration. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-24) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector×regime = Choppy regime 100%; UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal cell 21.05% (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector×regime = Choppy regime 100%; UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal cell 21.05%; recommended action: Pause new entries in sector=Metal until Metal share drops below 30% via natural exits; additionally pause new UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal entries until that cell drops below 0.15 share.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 19-position directional long book simultaneously with no validated cohort edge to justify the exposure. Metal sector concentration (36.8%) amplifies idiosyncratic commodity/sector shock risk on top of the regime risk.

evidence: regime_concentration.triggered=true, observed=1.0 (Choppy), threshold=0.80
UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal cell at 0.2105 share (4/19), breaches 0.20 cell threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell at 0.1579 share (3/19), approaching cell threshold
BULL_PROXY×Choppy×Metal cell at 0.1579 share (3/19)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort only Candidate tier (n=118) — unvalidated edge
Matched Choppy×BULL_PROXY cohort only Candidate tier (n=16) — unvalidated edge
Book is 100% directional long (13 UP_TRI + 6 BULL_PROXY = 19/19)
Metal sector is largest at 7/19 = 36.8% across both signal types
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in sector=Metal until Metal share drops below 30% via natural exits; additionally pause new UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal entries until that cell drops below 0.15 share.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 19-position directional long book simultaneously with no validated cohort edge to justify the exposure. Metal sector concentration (36.8%) amplifies idiosyncratic commodity/sector shock risk on top of the regime risk.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (above 0.80 threshold) AND the UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 21.05%. All concentration cells map only to Candidate-tier cohorts (Choppy×UP_TRI n=118, Choppy×BULL_PROXY n=16) — unvalidated edge. The book is also fully directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY = 19/19), so a Choppy→Bear flip would unwind the entire 19-position long book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
